---
name: Enhancement
about: Suggest a feature or enchancement.
labels: enhancement, needs-review
---

### Checklist
- [ ] I have searched the issues and this has not been suggested yet.
- [ ] I have checked the documentation to see if this feature already exists.

---

### Summary
*Is your feature request related to a problem or a limitation? Please describe.*

### Proposed Solution
*A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how you envision it working.*

### Use Case / Why is this needed?
*Describe how this feature would be used and who it would benefit. This helps the maintainer prioritize the request.*

### Alternatives Considered
*A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.*

### Other Details
*Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.*
